title: Simplified
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa0652ebb3c95b3851eda7fcc5624569fdd4b683.png)

Simplified is a stylised resource pack with the purpose of bringing a less noisy look to the game. It's colourful and keeps a consistent, simple style in every part of the game.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0W1m7mv/images/21e08dd7fc8c5cc6cecc6625387cf6d8af42b554.png))

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac3ea2702e88cdf5096b907d6be75597a01e70b6.webp)

Features
-
- Completely retextured
- Cleaner GUI/Font
- Varied mob textures
- Custom animal/monster models
- Varied plants and flowers, including a 3D pitcher plant and rotating sunflowers
- Custom flower pots
- Wisteria hanging roots
- Hanging leaves for cherry and azalea trees
- A smaller shield to match the packs style
- 3D rails and ladder
- Custom model for the new happy ghast harness

**Optifine or alternatives are required for features such as:**

- Connected textures
- Emissive textures
- Custom entity models/textures

**Add-on packs:**

[Simplified x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jeelh-simplified-fa)

All gallery images are taken with Complementary shaders
